notes: rule.core.media governs PRESENCE and STATE at the publish edge. The PKG.* codes are deterministic (engine/gate/validate-package.js over an image package): VISUAL_STATE_MISSING / MEDIA_MISSING from omitted header fields; VISUAL_CHECK_MISSING / VISUAL_CHECK_NOT_PASSING when the runner threads a visual-check result via the case 'visual_check' block (the gate only inspects it for image refs when one is supplied — the visual-check ENGINE is exercised in visual-default-pack/). The image package needs a temp CONTENT_HOME so the cooldown ledger lookup resolves; it returns empty (clean cooldown). FM.IMAGE_DESCRIPTION is the LLM-judged copy-vs-image code (prose, structural-only).

cases.name: visual-check-missing
cases.notes: Image package with no visual-check result attached.

cases.name: visual-check-not-passing
cases.notes: Visual-check result present but not passing.

cases.name: image-description
cases.notes: Copy narrates the image literally instead of adding context. LLM-judged.

cases.name: clean
cases.notes: Complete image package: visual_state + bound media + a passing visual check, asset not in cooldown.

cases.name: caption-clean
cases.notes: Clean control for FM.IMAGE_DESCRIPTION: the caption adds story/context, not a literal description.
